english: The field journal is being built

Log what happened in the field — irrigation, spraying, seeding, harvest, observations — so your sensor curves and analytics can be read in context. Entries anchor to a plot, capture the sensor snapshot at the moment of the activity, and appear as markers on your history charts.
lg: Wandiika ekyabaddewo mu nnimiro — okusukkulirira, okumansira eddagala, okusiga, okukungula, n'okulambula — okusobola okutegeera obulungi chart za sensor n'okwekenneenya kwo. Ebiwandiiko bikwatagana n'omusiri, ne bikwata endaba ya sensor mu kiseera ky'ekikolwa, era bilabika ng'obubonero ku chart z'ebyafaayo byo.

english: Six recent activities on a tap grid, product-first entry, and a plain-language confirmation line before every save.
lg: Ebikolwa mukaaga ebisembayo ku lupapula lw'okukwatako, okuwandiika nga otandika ku kika ky'ekyakozesebwa, n'olunyiriri olukakasa mu bigambo ebyangu buli lwoterekawo.

english: Structured, machine-readable entries per plot with frozen provenance — a detailed record designed for compliance profiles later.
lg: Ebiwandiiko ebitegekeddwa obulungi era ebisomeka na makina, buli musiri nga birina ensibuko etakyuka — ebiwandiiko eby'obujjuvu ebikoleddwa ku lw'enkola ez'okugoberera amateeka mu biseera ebijja.

english: Every entry tells you whether it is saved on the farm gateway or waiting for it. Nothing is silently lost.
lg: Buli kiwandiiko kikulaga oba kiterekeddwa ku Gateway y'ennimiro oba nga kikyalindirira. Tewali kibula nga tokimanyiiko.
